User.title: User Profile
User.description: Represents the user's study status, vocabulary learning progress, streak, goal settings, and custom bookmark folders.

progress.description: Map of vocabulary word IDs to user's knowledge status, custom study notes, and bookmarks.

goal.description: User's study goals, target words count per day, current learning streak, and history logs.

synonymProgress.description: Progress of user's synonym check tests.

folders.description: List of user's custom folders/bookmarks for word categorization.

settings.description: User preferences for default flashcard orders, audio pronunciations, quiz length, etc.

AccessRequest.title: Access Request
AccessRequest.description: Represents a purchase/access request for a restricted course via bKash payment.

/users/{userId}.description: Primary storage of individual user profiles containing all synchronized study data.

/access_requests/{requestId}.description: Storage of course access/purchase requests submitted by students.
